title: The Miracle of the Sargasso Sea
original_title: Το Θαύμα της Θάλασσας των Σαργασσών
overview: Elizabeth, a sexually yielding policewoman, is miserable in the narrow-minded town in which she's living. While Rita, a lonely eel-hatchery worker, is trying to escape from the sticky situations of her life.
